raw_consumer_statement:
I am submitting a complaint regarding a charge on my credit card for tickets to XXXX XXXX in XXXX, XXXX. I purchased tickets through a website that appeared to be the official XXXX XXXX ticket provider. The sites branding and presentation led me to believe I was buying directly from the official venue. 

After completing the purchase, I realized the website was a third-party reseller and not the official ticket site. The website was misleading and did not clearly indicate it was a separate vendor. 

I immediately contacted the merchant to cancel the booking and request a refund. The merchant refused, stating that their tickets are non-refundable, even though the purchase was made under misleading circumstances. I did not knowingly authorize this purchase from this merchant. 

Because the merchant misrepresented itself and refused to refund the charge, I am requesting the CFPBs assistance in resolving this issue and ensuring the charge is reversed. I have documentation including the purchase confirmation and my cancellation request. 

When I first contacted my credit card company to report this charge, I was told to wait until XXXX weeks after the event date before they could assist. When I called again to escalate and request a formal dispute, I was told they would not open a dispute at all. I was also informed that the merchant is a customer of the bank, which may have influenced their refusal to assist. 

This delay and refusal have left me without recourse, even though the merchant misrepresented itself and refused to refund the charge. I am requesting the CFPBs assistance in resolving this issue and ensuring the charge is reversed.
